name: Sylios Corp
summary: Sylios Corp, through its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration and development of oil and natural gas properties. The company is also involved in the purchase of royalty and working interest units in oil and natural gas producing properties and alternative land development projects. It holds royalties in certain wells in the state of Kentucky and Tennessee. The company was formerly known as US Natural Gas Corp. and changed its name to Sylios Corp in June 2014. Sylios Corp was founded in 2008 and is based in St. Petersburg, Florida.
